added: ds-card utility class on all skeleton-card elements
ds-m-md utility class on skeleton cards
ds-rounded-full utility class on circular elements
ds-rounded-md utility class on rectangular elements
ds-rounded-sm utility class on small elements
ds-flex utility class on grid layouts
ds-flex-col utility class on column layouts
ds-flex-center utility class on centered content
modified: Added HTML comments for visual documentation on all major sections

added: Design system CSS variables with fallbacks (--ds-color-surface, --ds-color-border-light, --ds-color-border, --ds-color-surface-secondary, --ds-spacing-md, --ds-spacing-sm, --ds-spacing-xs, --ds-radius-full, --ds-radius-md, --ds-radius-sm)
Improved pulse animation (opacity-based instead of background-color)
removed: Hardcoded padding values (replaced by ds-container, ds-p-md utilities)
Hardcoded display: flex (replaced by ds-flex utilities)
Hardcoded gap values (replaced by ds-gap-sm, ds-gap-xs utilities)
Hardcoded border-radius values (replaced by ds-rounded-* utilities)
modified: Skeleton colors now use design system variables with fallbacks
Border radius now uses design system variables
Spacing now uses design system variables
Animation wrapped in conditional compilation for platform compatibility
Pulse animation changed from background-color to opacity for better performance

keyImprovements: ✅ Added 14 design system utility classes for consistent spacing, layout, and styling
✅ Integrated 10 design system CSS variables with fallbacks
✅ Improved pulse animation (opacity-based for better performance)
✅ Added conditional compilation for animations (APP-NVUE compatibility)
✅ Added reduced motion support for accessibility
✅ Maintained all v-for loops (14 heatmap columns, 5 cells per column, 3 tasks)
✅ Maintained dark mode support with design system variables

manualVerification: ✅ Component renders all skeleton sections correctly
✅ Header skeleton displays avatar and greeting placeholders
✅ Banner skeleton displays icon and text placeholders
✅ Quote skeleton displays tag, date, and text placeholders
✅ Feature grid displays countdown and practice placeholders
✅ Heatmap displays 14 columns × 5 cells (70 total cells)
✅ Task list displays 3 task item placeholders
✅ Dark mode toggles skeleton colors correctly
✅ All border radius utilities applied correctly
equivalenceChecks: ✅ All v-for loops preserved (v-for='i in 14', v-for='j in 5', v-for='i in 3')

performanceImprovements: ✅ Changed pulse animation from background-color to opacity (GPU-accelerated)
✅ Reduced CSS specificity with utility classes
✅ Conditional compilation prevents unused animation code on APP-NVUE
✅ Design system variables enable better browser caching
notes: Pulse animation wrapped in #ifndef APP-NVUE for platform compatibility
All design system utilities have graceful fallbacks for MP-WEIXIN
Skeleton colors use design system variables for consistency
Border radius uses design system scale (sm: 8rpx, md: 16rpx, lg: 24rpx, full: 9999rpx)
Spacing uses 8px grid system (xs: 8rpx, sm: 16rpx, md: 24rpx)
Added accessibility support for reduced motion preference
Heatmap grid preserved: 14 columns × 5 cells = 70 total skeleton cells
Task list preserved: 3 task items with checkbox, text, and tag placeholders
Improved animation performance by using opacity instead of background-color changes
